Home.title:
Learn smarter.
Achieve more.
Home.subtitle: The first truly AI-native learning platform for students — with a personal tutor, smart exams, and adaptive courses all in one place.
Home.featuresTitle: Built for how students actually learn
Home.featuresSubtitle: AI tutoring, OCR grading, and adaptive courses — designed for every pace and style.
Home.feat1Desc: Context-aware assistant that explains concepts step-by-step and adapts to your level.
Home.feat2Desc: Upload your answer sheet. OCR reads it, grades it, and gives detailed feedback in seconds.
Home.feat3Desc: Track progress, find weak spots, and get recommendations on what to study next.
Home.ctaBlockTitle: Ready to transform how you learn?
Home.ctaBlockSubtitle: Join students already using Satr Edu to study smarter and score higher.
